description: Natural olive wood decorative bowl with organic form and warm brown tones.
condition: Good, natural wood grain and texture

description: Oil painting depicting a multi-figure tavern scene in a dark wood frame with gold liner.
condition: Good, craquelure visible on painting, minor scuffs on frame

title: Memphis Style Vase
description: Ceramic vase with speckled black and white gradient glaze and a spherical base.

title: Studio Wood Vase
description: Handcrafted from spalted wood.

title: Stainless Steel Spiral Sculpture
description: Brushed silver metal spiral sculpture.

title: Giacometti Candle Sticks (2) (MoMA Edition)
description: Brutalist design from the mid-20th century.

title: Brutalist Two Light Candle Holder German C 1970'S
description: Cast bronze with a textured finish, likely from the mid-20th century.

title: Signed Studio Vase
description: Glazed stoneware piece with a textured orange, black, and white finish.

title: Concrete Sculpture
description: Its minimalist, textural design with a central void is sculpted from concrete.

title: Wood Spiral Sculpture
description: Carved from layered wood, it presents a dynamic spiraling form.

title: Vollard Litho
description: Graphic print on paper, published by Ambroise Vollard in Paris in 1973, featuring abstract figures.

title: Cusco Painting of St. Christopher
description: Aged oil on canvas depicts Saint Christopher wading through water with the Christ Child, likely 18th-century Colonial art.

title: Marcelo Bonevardi Wall Art
description: Features a reddish-brown surface with an embedded abstract blue object, structured on a base of rough, painted wood blocks.

title: Lurelle Guild Bowl
description: Brushed metal bowl atop a clear glass sphere.

title: Ceramic French Vase
description: Glazed in yellow and black, its sculptural form suggests mid-century modern design. Unsigned.

title: Joel Stearns Ziggurat Box
description: Ziggurat shaped box from cardboard artist Joel Stearns

title: Joel Stearns Painting
description: Features a vibrant pattern of interlocking spirals and squares on a board using acrylic paints.

title: Burlwood Box
description: Crafted from a unique piece of light-toned burl wood, it features a hinged lid revealing a dark-lined interior.

title: Minoru Ohira Wood Wall Sculpture
description: Composed of numerous interlocking wooden blocks, some featuring subtle red and blue accents.

title: Ceramic Studio Vase
description: Hand-thrown ceramic vase with vertical stripes of textured unglazed brown, dark blue, and lavender glazes.

title: Calder Print
description: A vibrant lithograph on paper, likely from the mid-20th century American abstract movement, presented in a simple wooden frame.

title: Cicely Debeers Abstract
description: Oil on canvas, dated 1963, featuring abstract organic shapes in a simple wooden frame.

title: Studio Pot
description: Features a textured purple glaze with a sculptural spout, lid, and fin-like handle.

title: Minoru Ohira Sculpture
description: Black polished spheres rise from a light wood cube.

title: Inlaid Wood Platter
description: Constructed from diverse light and dark wood segments in a detailed geometric pattern, resting on a coordinated wooden pedestal.
